clean_story:
Now I will teach you Spirit.

Spirit is like wind—you no see, but you feel when it moves through you. Like fire warms body, Spirit warms heart, but with no flame. When big beast looks at you and knows you before you move—that is Spirit seeing. When old one’s bones rest in earth but voice still speaks in your dreams—that is Spirit talking. It is the pull in belly when tribe sings together, though no hands touch. You know Spirit when world breathes with you, not just around you.
